entries.definition:
l–ḥ–w/y tree bark; to peel off; to insult, to rebuke; beard, the
area where a beard grows. Of this root, only لِحْيَة liḥyatun occurs
once in the Qur’an.

لِحْيَة liḥyatun [n.] beard *(20:94) لَا تَأْخُذْ بِلِحْيَتِي do not abuse me,
do not man-handle me [lit. do not take hold of my beard].

لِحْيَة liḥyatun [n.] beard *(20:94) لَا تَأْخُذْ بِلِحْيَتِي do not abuse me,
